data.title: St. Johns County receives $1 million for Florida Black History Museum, celebrates historic milestone with state leaders.
data.description: Leaders from the state and local community came together in St. Johns County, Florida on September 18, 2025, to commemorate a significant milestone. The State of Florida has allocated $1 million for future planning and development in the county. The event served as a tribute to the accomplishments of the past while emphasizing the importance of investing in a prosperous future. This gathering symbolized cooperation and unity among state and community officials in advancing the strategic growth of St. Johns County.

data.title: Allegheny General Hospital to host filming for 'THE PITT' Season Two, a Warner Bros. series, in Pittsburgh.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, Allegheny General Hospital (AGH) of Allegheny Health Network (AHN) will be featured in the renowned Max Original drama series, 'THE PITT,' by Warner Bros. Television. The hospital will serve as a backdrop for the series, as production resumes.

data.title: Logicalis US selected for 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces in Technology™ List, underscoring commitment to employees.
data.description: Logicalis US, a prominent global technology services provider based in TROY, Mich., has recently achieved the prestigious recognition of being included in the 2025 Fortune Best Workplaces in Technology™ List. This acknowledgment highlights the company's dedication to creating a positive work environment, further solidifying its status as a Great Place to Work. This achievement underscores Logicalis US's commitment to its employees and reflects its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: EU agency approves Merck's Keytruda for new administration routes (SC) with recommended dosages of 395mg every 3 weeks or 790mg every 6 weeks.
data.description: On Friday, the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) issued two favorable opinions for Merck & Co. Inc.'s Keytruda (pembrolizumab). The first opinion recommends approving a new subcutaneous (SC) administration route and a solution for injection formulation. If granted approval, Keytruda SC could be given in just one minute every three weeks at a dosage of 395 mg, or in two minutes every six weeks at a dosage of 790 mg. This positive development applies to all KEYTRUDA indications for adult patients in Europe.

data.title: Trump hints TikTok deal with China progressing after call with Xi Jinping, but specifics remain uncertain.
data.description: Following a conversation with China's President Xi Jinping, the president expressed gratitude on Truth Social for the approval on TikTok. However, he indicated that discussions regarding the deal and other matters were ongoing.

data.title: TVA and Type One Energy partner to develop 350MW fusion power plant at Bull Run Fossil Plant for energy demands.
data.description: TVA and Type One Energy have strengthened their partnership to develop a 350-megawatt fusion power facility at TVA's prior Bull Run Fossil Plant location in Oak Ridge, Tennessee. This collaboration emphasizes TVA's pioneering role in advanced nuclear technology to meet the increasing energy needs...

data.title: Navan, Inc. files for IPO, plans to offer Class A common stock, share price TBD. Will list on Nasdaq Global.
data.description: Navan, Inc., based in Palo Alto, California, has disclosed its intentions of going public through an initial public offering (IPO) of its Class A common stock. The company, a comprehensive platform for business travel, payments, and expense management, has filed a registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. While the exact number of shares to be offered and the pricing range have not been finalized, Navan has submitted an application to list its Class A common stock on the Nasdaq Global Market.

data.title: Alaris Equity Partners Income Trust declares Q3 distribution; United States distribution restrictions apply.
data.description: This information is not intended for distribution in the United States. Failure to adhere to this restriction may lead to a violation of United States securities law.

data.title: Nuclear Company hires Hernando A. Madroñero as Head of Nuclear Deployment for construction of 1st fleet of reactors. 100 characters.
data.description: In South Carolina, The Nuclear Company has appointed Hernando A. Madroñero as the Head of Nuclear Deployment, Project Executive. Madroñero, with over 30 years of power generation expertise, will oversee the construction of the company's initial series of nuclear reactors. This nuclear energy leader is at the forefront of deploying gigawatt-scale nuclear power projects in the United States and spearheading advancements in nuclear construction methods.Madroñero's recent role involved design and construction responsibilities, making him a valuable addition to the company's efforts in expanding nuclear power generation.

data.title: Rekt Brands sells 1 millionth can of Rekt Drinks through MoonPay collaboration, hitting a major milestone.
data.description: Rekt Brands recently achieved a significant accomplishment by selling its 1 millionth can of Rekt Drinks sparkling water in collaboration with MoonPay.

data.title: NVIDIA's HGX B200 reduces carbon emissions and boosts efficiency, surpassing the HGX H100. Exciting news for sustainable computing!
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled the HGX B200 platform, boasting a notable reduction in embodied carbon emissions and a substantial improvement in performance and energy efficiency when compared to its forerunner, the HGX H100. This advancement signifies a significant step forward in sustainability efforts by NVIDIA.

data.title: Andrew Peller Limited releases 2025 AGM voting results; shareholders cast their ballots on Sept. 17, 2025.
data.description: In Grimsby, Ontario on September 19, 2025, Andrew Peller Limited (APL) disclosed the outcomes of its 2025 annual general meeting that took place on September 17, 2025. The Company shared the final voting statistics from this meeting.

data.title: FTX Recovery Trust to distribute $1.6 billion to creditors in 3rd round on Sept 30, 2025 per Chapter 11 Plan.
data.description: Today in Wilmington, Delaware, FTX Trading Ltd. (known as FTX.com) and the FTX Recovery Trust jointly revealed their plans for distributing funds in accordance with FTX's Chapter 11 Plan of Reorganization. This distribution will be made to holders of valid claims as outlined in the Plan.

data.title: MākuSafe wins 2025 MSD Solutions Lab Safety Innovation Challenge by National Safety Council, showcasing 10 tech solutions.
data.description: At the NSC Safety Congress & Expo in Denver on September 19, 2025, tech innovators unveiled 10 cutting-edge solutions aimed at addressing musculoskeletal disorders (MSDs), a leading workplace injury. The National Safety Council featured these breakthrough technologies at the fourth annual MSD Solutions Lab. This initiative focuses on curbing workplace injuries through advanced measures, highlighting the importance of preventative strategies. The event brought together industry experts, showcasing innovations designed to reduce MSDs and improve workplace safety standards. The 10 technologies demonstrated at the Expo offer promising avenues to mitigate the risks associated with MSDs, contributing to a safer work environment for employees across various sectors.

data.title: Stock indexes rise as Wall Street awaits news from Trump's call with Xi Jinping, Dow aiming for new highs.
data.description: Key stock indexes saw an increase on Friday as the financial markets anticipated updates following a discussion between President Donald Trump and China's President Xi Jinping. The Dow Jones Industrial Average is aiming for new record levels amidst the talks. Furthermore, a deal involving TikTok and Nvidia is being closely monitored, with Nvidia currently testing an important threshold.
